hero.description: Discover our curated collection of cosmetics, jewelry, and fragrances — elevating your natural beauty every day.

natural.label: Natural Ingredients
natural.desc: 100% organic, pure plant extracts, absolutely safe for all skin types.

design.label: Unique Design
design.desc: Each piece is a unique story — crafted by hand by skilled artisans.

delivery.label: Thoughtful Delivery
delivery.desc: Sustainable packaging, eco-friendly, with nationwide delivery in 24–48 hours.

quality.label: Quality Commitment
quality.desc: 30-day return policy, 24/7 customer support. Your satisfaction is our top priority.

newsletter.subtitle: Newsletter
newsletter.description: Get immediate access to a 10% discount on your first order, along with the latest news about new collections and exclusive offers.
